finding_results.notes: The fallout block now stages a live dossier breach: Tomás explicitly tells Priya he received her file, cites the hospital/employment-verification detail from it, and tries to bargain for information about who has his. Viktor's re-entry now relies on his standing presence and voice, without repeating the height description established in chapter 1.

pass_summaries.summary: Replaced the abstract dossier fallout with a concrete Tomás/Priya breach that produces immediate leverage and withdrawal, preserved Haruki's push toward Marcus and the server-room death chain, corrected all flagged tense slips, removed Viktor's repeated height description, and reduced 'The.' opener density well below the required threshold.

Single finding addressed. The lab argument (lines 103-117) stays as the initial public accusation where Haruki identifies Marcus and makes the technical case. The server-room confrontation (lines 129-149) was reworked so Haruki brings a new piece of evidence — the VLAN diagram with Marcus's signature — and Marcus's refusal is territorial rather than a restatement of the same technical defense. The two scenes now climb different ladders before converging on the same physical outcome.
